mission.title: ollama: No llama.cpp acknowledgement
mission.description: No llama.cpp acknowledgement . This issue affects 35+ users.

steps.title: Check current Ollama setup
steps.description:
Verify your Ollama version:
```bash
ollama version
```
This issue was about missing llama.cpp acknowledgement in the Ollama README.

steps.title: Review the issue
steps.description: Ollama is heavily dependent on [llama.cpp](https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp) for its LLM inference backend. The project was missing proper acknowledgement of this dependency in its README and documentation.

steps.title: Resolution
steps.description:
The Ollama team added llama.cpp acknowledgement to the README. See the [commit](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/commit/9755cf9173152047030b6d080c29c829bb050a15) for the change.

This is a documentation-only fix that does not require any user action.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: The llama.cpp acknowledgement is now visible in the Ollama README on GitHub. No configuration changes are needed.

resolution.summary: The Ollama team added proper llama.cpp acknowledgement to the project README.

prerequisites.description: A working ollama installation or development environment.
